conversation.content: Hi Morgan, checking whether 19241 David Memorial Dr could fit a light-industrial client that needs warehouse area and drive-in access.

Hi Baylor,

This space wouldn't be a good fit for your client as it is more office heavy as opposed to a true warehouse with drive in space.

However, we may have 27610 Commerce Oaks Dr available and can send the marketing package. Happy to set up a tour if that alternative looks interesting.

Best,
Morgan

proposalEventsBeforeDeterministic.notes: Broker suggested this as an alternate after ruling out the original property.

proposalEventsBeforeDeterministic.question: Happy to set up a tour if that alternative looks interesting.

conversation.content: Hi Jordan, could you send availability, loading, clear height, and power details for 3200 Polaris Ave?

Hi Baylor,

The building is available and I attached the updated offering memorandum. It has dual access roll-up doors at 10 feet high and warehouse ceiling height over 14 feet. The gap is power: it does not currently have three-phase power. Let me know if you want to tour it.

Best,
Jordan

operatorChecks: PDF/flyer evidence remains attached to this row.
Power gap is visible in results and map detail panel.
Tour offer pauses for user approval.

conversation.content: Hi Taylor, can you share the industrial specs for 2900 S Highland Dr?
Suite 120 is available. It is 5,000 SF with office, reception, restrooms, one 12x12 grade-level door, 24 foot ceilings, and asking rent of $1.70 MG. I can get a floor plan over later.
Thanks Taylor. Do you know whether the suite has three-phase power and any notable amperage?
It does and a ton of amps. Highly upgraded power was installed because the whole building used to be a commercial printing company.

operatorChecks: AI should ask for missing power instead of prematurely completing.
Later power reply should complete the row and preserve the context in comments.
Tour/results outputs should show the property as viable.

conversation.content: Hi Casey, could you send specs and any flyer for 2860 N Commerce St?

Looping in my teammate who can help here. The brochure is attached. Power is 400 amps, 208Y/120, 3-phase. The space is still worth reviewing and we can coordinate a showing if your client wants to shortlist it.
